name: hug/eu-label
description: Displays the EU warranty label (Directive (EU) 2024/825, Implementing Regulation (EU) 2025/1960) and the GPSR manufacturer information (Regulation (EU) 2023/988, Art. 19) in the storefront and attaches the label to the order confirmation mail

label.en-GB: Product Compliance: EU Label, GARAN & GPSR

description.de-DE: EU-Gewährleistungslabel (Storefront + Mail-Anhang), GARAN-Garantielabel für Haltbarkeitsgarantien und GPSR-Herstellerangaben — konfigurierbar pro Sales Channel.
description.en-GB: EU warranty label (storefront + mail attachment), GARAN guarantee label for durability guarantees and GPSR manufacturer information — configurable per sales channel.
